summary: Implemented opt-in live-provider smoke with isolated defaults
raw: Added tests/e2e/harness_live_provider.rs and wired it into tests/e2e/main.rs. The smoke skips unless JCODE_HARNESS_LIVE_PROVIDER_SMOKE is truthy, requires explicit provider/profile plus model when enabled, uses temporary JCODE_HOME, JCODE_RUNTIME_DIR, and cwd, removes JCODE_TEST_SESSION/JCODE_DEBUG_CONTROL, disables skills, and supports copying a reviewed config.toml via JCODE_HARNESS_LIVE_PROVIDER_CONFIG for provider_profile runs. Updated SKILLS_HARNESS docs, status, and release notes template.
followUp: Do not enable live smoke in default CI without reviewed credentials and quota.

summary: Offline/default validation passed; live-provider smoke skipped by default and made no provider call.
raw: Task 310592d8sv completed exit 0. harness_live_provider: 1 passed, skipped live provider smoke unless JCODE_HARNESS_LIVE_PROVIDER_SMOKE=1 plus provider/profile and model. harness_cli: 25 passed. cargo check -p jcode finished successfully.
followUp: Run real live-provider smoke only with explicit env and reviewed credentials.

verification.commandOrCheck: cargo fmt --check && cargo test --test e2e harness_live_provider -- --nocapture && cargo test --test e2e harness_cli -- --nocapture && cargo check -p jcode

summary: Implemented CI-friendly offline smoke e2e assertions
raw: Added harness_smoke_runs_offline_tool_cases_with_deterministic_artifacts to tests/e2e/harness_cli.rs. The test runs jcode-harness smoke --cwd against an isolated temp workspace with isolated JCODE_HOME/JCODE_RUNTIME_DIR, asserts representative deterministic tool case headings, asserts default output excludes webfetch/websearch/codesearch, and verifies sample.txt plus added.txt final contents. Updated status and release template.
followUp: Keep --include-network outside default CI unless separately reviewed.

summary: Documented remaining init and clean-code JSON schemas with focused init e2e
raw: Documented jcode-harness init --json and clean-code check --json schemas with field shapes and guarantees. Added harness_init_json_reports_scaffold_and_detected_stack_offline e2e test that uses an isolated temp workspace/home, writes a local Cargo.toml marker, runs init --cwd <temp> --yes --no-memory-wiki --json, parses stdout, asserts root/files_written/files_skipped/detected_stack/next_steps, and verifies scaffold artifacts stay inside the temp workspace. Updated status and release template with focused validation commands.
followUp: Keep schema docs in lockstep with future additive automation fields.
